title: Western Digital (WDC) to Separate HDD and Flash Businesses
text: Western Digital (WDC) plans to divide its HDD and Flash businesses to drive innovation and generate significant value for its shareholders.

title: S&P 500 Gains and Losses Today: Western Digital Shares Soar Amid Spinoff Plan
text: U.S. equities roared back from last week's selloff, posting gains on Monday ahead of more big earnings releases as well as this week's Fed meeting and October employment report. The S&P 500 gained 1.2%, pulling it out of correction territory.

title: Why Western Digital Stock Popped Today
text: Western Digital announced better-than-feared fiscal first-quarter results today. The digital storage solutions specialist also announced plans to spin off its flash and HDD segments into two separate, public companies.

title: Western Digital Announces Proposed $1.3 Billion Convertible Notes Offering
text: SAN JOSE, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Western Digital Corporation (Nasdaq: WDC) (“Western Digital”) today announced a proposed offering of $1.3 billion aggregate principal amount of convertible senior notes due 2028 (the “notes”), subject to market and other conditions. The notes will be senior unsecured obligations of Western Digital and will be guaranteed, jointly and severally, on a senior unsecured basis by each of Western Digital's wholly-owned subsidiaries from time to time guaranteeing West.

title: Western Digital Stock Jumps On Plan To Split Businesses
text: Western Digital will separate its flash-memory and traditional hard-drive businesses, the company said Monday. WDC stock jumped on the news.

title: Western Digital Shares Soar as Company Splits Off Flash Memory Business
text: Shares of Western Digital Corp. (WDC) surged more than 10% in early trading Monday before giving back some gains after the computer hard drive manufacturer said it would spin off its flash memory business.

title: Western Digital (WDC) Q1 Earnings Beat, Revenues Fall Y/Y
text: Western Digital's (WDC) fiscal first-quarter performance is affected due to weak performance across Cloud and Client end markets.

title: Western Digital Corporation (WDC) Q1 2024 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Western Digital Corporation (NASDAQ:WDC ) Q1 2024 Earnings Conference Call October 30, 2023 8:30 AM ET Company Participants Peter Andrew - Vice President, Financial Planning and Analyst and Investor Relations David Goeckeler - Chief Executive Officer Wissam Jabre - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Joe Moore - Morgan Stanley Aaron Rakers - Wells Fargo Krish Sankar - TD Cowen Wamsi Mohan - Bank of America Sidney Ho - Deutsche Bank Tom O'Malley - Barclays Srini Pajjuri - Raymond James Karl Ackerman - BNP Paribas Timothy Arcuri - UBS Vijay Rakesh - Mizuho Harlan Sur - JPMorgan Mehdi Hosseini - SIG Toshiya Hari - Goldman Sachs Operator Good morning, ladies and gentlemen and welcome to the Western Digital First Quarter Fiscal 2024 Earnings Call. All participants will be in a listen-only mode.

title: Why Are Stocks Up Today?
text: Stocks are up today as investors react to the latest market happenings and we've got a quick breakdown of all the news worth noting on Monday! First off, investors will remember that the Federal Reserve is preparing to make its next interest rate decision on Wednesday.

title: WDC Stock Alert: Western Digital Will Split Into 2 Companies
text: Western Digital (NASDAQ: WDC ) stock is in the news Monday as investors react to the data storage company announcing plans to split into two businesses. According to a press release from Western Digital, the company's Board of Directors has approved a plan to split its HDD and Flash businesses into two separate companies.

title: Western Digital (WDC) Reports Q1 Loss, Tops Revenue Estimates
text: Western Digital (WDC) came out with a quarterly loss of $1.76 per share versus the Zacks Consensus Estimate of a loss of $1.88. This compares to earnings of $0.20 per share a year ago.

title: Western Digital stock rallies as it opts for a flash spin-out
text: Western Digital Corp (NYSE:WDC) shares started Monday strongly as quarterly financials exceeded market forecasts and the memory maker told investors it intends to split off and spin out its flash memory business. The Western Digital brand will retain its core hard drive business whilst shares in a new vehicle holding the flash business will be issued to shareholders.

title: Here are 16 stocks Jim Cramer is watching, including Microsoft, Chevron, Southwest
text: Here are some of the tickers on Jim's radar for Monday, Oct. 30, taken directly from his reporter's notebook:

title: Western Digital to Separate Flash-Memory Business. The Stock Is Rising.
text: Western Digital stock surged on Monday after it said it intends to split its disk-drive and flash memory businesses into two independent companies.

title: Western Digital's stock jumps on plan to spin off flash memory unit to shareholders
text: Western Digital Corp.'s stock WDC, +1.86% was up 12.3% in premarket trading on Monday after the San Jose, Calif., data-storage company said it would spin off its flash memory businesses into a separate public company in the second half of 2024.

title: Western Digital Reports Fiscal First Quarter 2024 Financial Results
text: SAN JOSE, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Western Digital Corp. (Nasdaq: WDC) today reported fiscal first quarter 2024 financial results. “Western Digital's fiscal first quarter results exceeded our expectations as the team's efforts to bolster business agility and develop differentiated and innovative products across a broad range of end-markets have resulted in sequential margin improvement across flash and HDD businesses,” said David Goeckeler, Western Digital CEO. “Our Consumer and Client end mark.

title: Western Digital (WDC) to Post Q1 Earnings: Key Factors to Note
text: Western Digital's (WDC) fiscal first-quarter performance is likely to have been affected by soft consumer demand due to prevailing global macroeconomic uncertainties and rising inflation.

title: Why Western Digital Plunged Today
text: Western Digital's merger with Kioxia was scuttled. Interestingly, a large competitor was able to nix the deal.

title: Western Digital's Deal With Kioxia Is Off. WDC Stock Is Sinking.
text: Among the more volatile stocks in the market this year, Western Digital (NASDAQ: WDC ) continues to excite investors. Shares of WDC stock sank more than 10% in today's session.

title: Western Digital Stock Tumbles On Report Of Called-Off Merger Talks
text: WDC stock fell after Nikkei reported that Western Digital notified Kioxia Holdings that it would exit merger talks

title: Western Digital Drops on Report Kioxia Merger Talks Have Ended
text: Reports have circulated that Western would combine its flash business with Kioxia, separating it from its disk drive operation.

title: Western Digital to Announce First Quarter Fiscal 2024 Financial Results on October 30, 2023
text: SAN JOSE, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Western Digital Corp. (NASDAQ: WDC) plans to announce its first quarter fiscal year 2024 financial results before the market opens on Monday, October 30, 2023. The investment community conference call to discuss these results will be held that day at 5:30 a.m. Pacific / 8:30 a.m. Eastern. title: Western Digital Stock Nabs Bull Note After Merger
text: Western Digital Corp (NASDAQ:WDC) stock is flat this morning despite a bull note from Deutsche Bank.

title: Economic Angst Shakes Up Techs: Chip Stocks Lead the Plunge
text: Only four stocks in the Technology Select Sector SPDR Fund NYSEARCA: XLK posted gains on October 13, as the spooky specter of higher interest rates sent tech stocks lower.

title: Which Is A Better Pick – Western Digital Stock Or Expedia?
text: Given its better prospects, we believe Western Digital stock (NYSE: WDC) is a better pick than Expedia stock (NASDAQ: EXPE).
